positive: A stylized minimalist forest scene, centered composition, showing glowing ethereal mushrooms and intricate root systems intertwined with clean, geometric forest lines. The atmosphere is magical and serene. Use strong bioluminescent glows in vibrant teal, electric blue, and soft lavender against deep, rich forest blacks and emerald greens. The style should be a perfect blend of vector illustration, Art Deco geometry, and Japanese woodblock woodcut art, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast. The composition should be highly graphic and repeatable for a seamless apparel print, with no discernible edges or scene boundaries. Studio lighting, poster-quality, crisp detail, digital art, volumetric light.
